# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: users-grpc
  namespace: users
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: users-http
  namespace: users
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: users-grpc-allow-orders-and-web
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: users-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: users-http-allow-web
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: users-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-grpc
  namespace: orders
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---

  namespace: orders

    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---

metadata:
  name: orders-grpc-allow-web
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---

  name: orders-http-allow-web
  namespace: orders

  server:
    name: orders-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---

  server:

  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders

        - name: orders

  namespace: payments

    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments

    matchLabels:
      app: payments

metadata:
  name: payments-http
  namespace: payments

    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments

  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---

metadata:
  name: payments-grpc-allow-orders
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-http-allow-orders
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-http
  namespace: web
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: web
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-http-allow-ingress
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
